tools.name: create_note
tools.description: Creates a new note. Prefer updating an existing note when one matches. Optional content is markdown converted to blocks; optional blocks[] is structured content (type, content, block_id, meta).

tools.name: list_notes
tools.description: Lists notes newest first. Optional search: comma/space keywords (OR). fuzzy (default true) allows small typos.

tools.name: get_note
tools.description: Canonical read: returns note title and full blocks array (block_id, type, content, order, meta).

tools.name: note_exists
tools.description: Checks whether a note_id exists and returns lightweight metadata (title, modifiedUtc) when found.

tools.name: read_note
tools.description: Legacy alias for get_note.

tools.name: search_notes
tools.description: Search notes with block snippets. query: comma/space keywords; match_all requires every keyword; fuzzy (default true) allows typos. mode=text or semantic (may not map to notes).

tools.name: get_recent_notes
tools.description: Recency-ordered notes (what was I working on).

tools.name: update_note
tools.description: Updates title and/or body. Markdown content becomes blocks; or pass blocks[] to replace structure.

tools.name: append_to_note
tools.description: Appends markdown (text) or blocks[] to the end as real blocks (not a single collapsed block).

tools.name: insert_blocks
tools.description: Insert blocks at top, bottom, before_block_id, or after_block_id (anchor_block_id required for the last two).

tools.name: replace_block
tools.description: Replace a single block by block_id. block payload uses type + markdown content.

tools.name: delete_blocks
tools.description: Deletes blocks by id list.

tools.name: restructure_note
tools.description: Full replacement of block list. Use only for global reorganize.

tools.name: convert_block
tools.description: Changes block type (e.g. Heading1 to Heading2). new_type is BlockType enum name.

tools.name: find_related_notes
tools.description: Heuristic related notes via token overlap (local, no cloud).

tools.name: get_backlinks
tools.description: Reserved for wiki links; returns unavailable until implemented.

tools.name: get_note_outline
tools.description: Returns heading blocks only (TOC) with block_id and order for precise block operations.

tools.name: get_workspace_summary
tools.description: Aggregate stats: note count, total blocks, recent notes.

tools.name: read_note_lines
tools.description: Numbered lines over markdown projection of the note. Optional line_range e.g. 1-20.

tools.name: replace_note_lines
tools.description: Replace inclusive 1-based lines in markdown projection; rebuilds blocks from markdown.

tools.name: insert_note_lines
tools.description: Insert markdown lines before 1-based at_line in markdown projection.

tools.name: open_note
tools.description: Opens the note in the Notes UI.
